steps.t: The watching-stone inhabited by the spirit Zaghárog is on the road to the Caverns of Fire, in Talath Úrui.
Zaghárog showed you a particular area in Lhingris and asked you to kill the creature there.
The watching-stone inhabited by the spirit Zaghárog is on the road to the Caverns of Fire, in Talath Úrui.
Zaghárog told you to walk to the north-west. Will this provide your answer?
Harthalín is by the road to Nargroth, on the eastern edge of Talath Úrui.
